title: triteleia howellii
intro: Triteleia howellii, also known as Howell's triteleia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Triteleia howellii include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Triteleia howellii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
